criterion: E=1-cos(theta) nonincreasing (max step increase <= 1e-09) and theta(T) -> 0 (|theta(T)| <= 0.001) over 200 seeded trials
explanation: We integrate the angle ODE from 200 seeded (alpha, theta0) pairs and form E = 1 - cos(theta) along each trajectory. The figure overlays a subsample of E(t) curves (all monotonically decreasing) with the ensemble mean. The verdict checks that no step increases E beyond RK4 round-off and that every trajectory converges to 0.
hypothesis: For the d=2 flow theta' = -alpha sin(theta) (Example 6.1), the Lyapunov function E(theta) = 1 - cos(theta) satisfies E'(t) = -alpha sin^2(theta) <= 0, so E decreases monotonically and theta(t) -> 0 (the cluster direction) from any start in (-pi, pi).
